{ "name": "globals", "version": "14.0.0", "description": "Global identifiers from different JavaScript environments", "license": "MIT", "repository": "sindresorhus/globals", "funding": "https://github.com/sponsors/sindresorhus", "author": { "name": "Sindre Sorhus", "email": "sindresorhus@gmail.com", "url": "https://sindresorhus.com" }, "sideEffects": false, "engines": { "node": ">=18" }, "scripts": { "test": "xo && ava && tsd", "prepare": "npm run --silent update-types", "update-builtin-globals": "node scripts/get-builtin-globals.mjs", "update-types": "node scripts/generate-types.mjs > index.d.ts" }, "files": [ "index.js", "index.d.ts", "globals.json" ], "keywords": [ "globals", "global", "identifiers", "variables", "vars", "jshint", "eslint", "environments" ], "devDependencies": { "ava": "^2.4.0", "cheerio": "^1.0.0-rc.12", "tsd": "^0.30.4", "type-fest": "^4.10.2", "xo": "^0.36.1" }, "xo": { "ignores": [ "get-browser-globals.js" ], "rules": { "node/no-unsupported-features/es-syntax": "off" } }, "tsd": { "compilerOptions": { "resolveJsonModule": true } } }
